title: Phegopteris sparsisora
taxonomy: Phegopteris sparsisora is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Phegopteris and is a type of deciduous fern. Phegopteris sparsisora is native to parts of Asia and is often found in mountainous regions. The classification of Phegopteris sparsisora is as follows: kingdom Plantae, division Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, family Thelypteridaceae, genus Phegopteris, species P. sparsisora. Phegopteris sparsisora is a relatively rare species of fern.
